articles.title: Telecom body COAI announces new leadership, appoints Rahul Vatts as chairperson
articles.description: COAI, India's digital communications body, held its annual meeting, electing Rahul Vatts of Bharti Airtel as Chairperson and Dr. Ravi P. Gandhi of Reliance Jio as Vice-Chairperson for 2026-27. The organization emphasized the sector's crucial role in India's digital economy, highlighting the evolution of technologies like 5G Advanced and AI. COAI pledged to collaborate with stakeholders for trusted, secure, and future-ready infrastructure to boost economic growth.

articles.title: A $300-billion opportunity? Why Iran's Revolutionary Guards are watching US talks closely
articles.description: As Washington and Tehran pursue a deal, Iran's Revolutionary Guards could emerge stronger. Oil export waivers, reconstruction funds and business ties may expand IRGC influence, raising concerns for investors and Western governments.

articles.title: PM Modi in West Bengal to launch projects, release over ₹18,880 crore to farmers under PM-KISAN
articles.description: PM Narendra Modi is on a two-day visit to West Bengal, where he will launch development projects, release the 23rd PM-KISAN instalment, participate in International Yoga Day celebrations and attend a programme at Syama Prasad Mookerjee Port

articles.title: "5-Year Consensual Relation Can't Be Termed Rape": Allahabad Court's Big Order
articles.description: Court ruled that a long-term consensual relationship between two adults cannot be treated as rape merely because a promise to marry was not fulfilled

articles.title: Chaos at Flipkart Glam Up Fest as influencers fight over hampers; video viral
articles.description: The Flipkart Glam Up Fest held at Delhi’s Pragati Maidan on June 19 brought together beauty influencers from across the country.

articles.title: 'Kuch log...': Sanjay Raut counters Eknath Shinde's 'sher akela aata hai' remark with loyal dog post
articles.description: Political tensions escalate between Shiv Sena factions as Sanjay Raut fires back at Eknath Shinde's 'lion' jibe with a post calling some people disloyal dogs. This follows speculation of six Uddhav Thackeray camp MPs potentially defecting to Shinde's side. Raut announced action, including disqualification efforts, against the absent MPs, while Thackeray emotionally appealed to workers, vowing not to hand the party to 'thieves'.

articles.title: All About Trump's New Air Force One: A $400 Million Jet Gifted By Qatar
articles.description: The United States Air Force has introduced a new "bridge aircraft", a modified Boeing 747-8i, to support presidential travel amid delays in the long-term Air Force One replacement programme.

articles.title: Bihar court grants interim relief to educator Khan Sir in coaching institute firing case
articles.description: A Bihar court granted interim relief to popular educator Faisal Khan, known as 'Khan Sir', in a firing and vandalism case. The court issued a 'no coercive action' order until the next hearing. Police had registered an FIR against Khan Sir and two others following an incident at his coaching institute where two guards were arrested based on video evidence of aerial firing and vandalism.

articles.title: Bizarre robbery: TN Man blocks signal with shirt to stop train, snatches gold chain, gets caught
articles.description: Chennai Railway Police arrest a man who dangerously blocked a railway signal light with his shirt to stop the Nellai Express and rob a passenger.

articles.title: Cabinet meeting to be held in Coastal Karnataka, says Chief Minister
articles.description: Chief Minister D.K. Shivakumar announces a Cabinet meeting in Coastal Karnataka to enhance tourism and resolve investment challenges.

articles.title: Sena not a plot of land one can put a name on: Shinde
articles.description: Contrary to speculations, the six breakaway Sena (UBT) MPs who have reportedly submitted a letter to the Lok Sabha speaker seeking a merger with the Shinde-led Sena did not turn up at the foundation day programme organised by the Sena

articles.title: Hailee Steinfeld and Josh Allen finally reveal baby daughter's name two months after keeping fans in suspense
articles.description: Hailee Steinfeld publicly revealed the name of her daughter, Harper Haize Allen, through a heartfelt letter published on her Substack newsletter Beau Society on June 19. In the letter, addressed directly to Harper, Steinfeld reflects on early motherhood with rawness and warmth, describing how time now moves in ounces and naps rather than months. She and husband Josh Allen welcomed Harper on April 2, less than a year after their Santa Barbara wedding in May 2025.

articles.title: Will Mumbai's BEST buses run today? Strike continues after talks fail, lakhs of commuters hit
articles.description: The strike severely affected public transport across Mumbai. Out of BEST's fleet of 2,766 buses, only 48 remained operational on Friday. Several buses that initially left depots were reportedly forced to return after incidents of stone-pelting and obstruction by striking workers.

articles.title: Brazilian President Takes Swipe At Neymar: "Working Remotely At FIFA WC"
articles.description: Brazilian star Neymar is "the first player in the world to be called up to the national side and be working remotely", Brazil President Luiz Inacio Lula de Silva joked.

articles.title: 'Best in history': Who does Lamine Yamal think is football's greatest?
articles.description: Yamal's comments came after Messi led defending champions Argentina to a 3-0 win over Saudi Arabia at Kansas City Stadium on Wednesday.

articles.title: Anthropic blackout episode shows that frontier AI needs global governance
articles.description: India, with one of the world’s largest AI user bases and vast amounts of data that contribute to the value and capabilities of global AI systems, is a critical stakeholder in this debate. It must play an active role in shaping the international regulatory framework that will govern AI's future

articles.title: Iran is the biggest winner from US truce push: Jefferies report
articles.description: Iran has emerged as the biggest beneficiary of the proposed US-Iran ceasefire framework, according to Jefferies, which says the deal could unlock billions of dollars in frozen funds and ease sanctions on Tehran. The brokerage also flagged rising AI exuberance, sticky inflation and growing market concentration as key themes shaping the global investment landscape.

articles.title: New West Bengal government clears all CBI sanction requests
articles.description: The government also restored the general consent for prosecution -- revoked by the then TMC regime in 2018 -- last week.

articles.title: 77-year-old dies as IIT graduate pushes him after parking spat in Noida
articles.description: A heated parking dispute between a 77-year-old retired bank employee and his 30-year-old IIT engineer neighbour in Noida tragically ended with the elder man's death. The elderly victim was allegedly pushed to the ground during the argument, sustaining injuries. He passed away hours later in the hospital, prompting police to register a case of culpable homicide not amounting to murder against the neighbour.

articles.title: Big 'expose' on Covid origins: Documents allege Biden's top medical adviser funded Wuhan lab
articles.description: Outgoing DNI Tulsi Gabbard releases declassified documents alleging Biden's chief medical adviser funded Wuhan lab research, influenced Covid origin assessments and misled Congress under oath.

articles.title: Times Square Shooting Update: Gang Links Surface, Charges Against 17-Year-Old Suspect Announced
articles.description: A 17-year-old has been charged with attempted murder after opening fire in a crowded Times Square intersection Thursday afternoon, sending tourists running for cover.

articles.title: Bangalore Development Authority plans facial recognition system at headquarters to curb middlemen
articles.description: BDA plans facial recognition system at headquarters to curb middlemen

articles.title: Who is Carlos Mencia? 5 things to know as comedian faces charges over alleged $8 million income reporting failure
articles.description: Mencia owes more than $300,000 in state taxes on income totaling $8.7 million.

articles.title: Inside designer Bill Bensley’s private Chiang Mai estate, now available for private bookings
articles.description: The acclaimed designer behind some of Asia’s most distinctive hotels has opened Hacienda Botanica, his 16-hectare Mexican-inspired retreat in northern Thailand, to guests.

articles.title: ‘Ggm grew taller but people drifted apart’
articles.description: Dr. VK Gupta reflects on Gurugram's transformation and urges for planned growth to foster community amid rapid expansion and modernization challenges.

articles.title: Jeffery Simmons contract extension: Titans sign three-year deal making NFL history for defensive tackle market
articles.description: Jeffery Simmons’ value reflects his elite status among NFL interior defenders, widely viewed as one of the league’s best at the position.

articles.title: Adani Samsara residents flag water, infra issues; all services well maintained, says realtor
articles.description: Residents of Adani Samsara allege ongoing infrastructure issues, including water shortages and sewage problems, while Adani Realty denies these claims.

articles.title: GMDA floats tender to start Shree Sheetla Mata hospital and medical in Sector 102
articles.description: GMDA invites tenders for operating Shree Sheetla Mata Devi medical college and hospital in Gurugram, featuring 883 beds and a 150-seat college.

articles.title: BMTC electric bus kills mason in Bengaluru, driver flees
articles.description: Bus accident: BMTC electric bus ran over and killed a 58-year-old mason in Bengaluru near Manganahalli Circle. Driver fled after accident. Police have seized bus and launched a search. Jnanabharathi traffic police registered case and probe underway go

articles.title: Goa received more than 46 lakh tourists in first five months of this year
articles.description: Goa welcomed over 46.39 lakh tourists from January to May this year, a slight uptick attributed to enhanced connectivity and diverse experiences. The state saw a 0.39% increase in visitors compared to the previous year, with domestic tourists forming the majority.

articles.title: Small emitters contribute more to pollution than industries in Indo-Gangetic Plain: Study
articles.description: Small emitters contribute more to pollution than industries in Indo-Gangetic Plain: Study

articles.title: Tamil Nadu to roll out Intellectual Property Rights policy with focus on GI products
articles.description: Tamil Nadu to roll out Intellectual Property Rights policy with focus on GI products

articles.title: Psychology Says This Unexpected Sign Points To A Strong Personality
articles.description: Psychology suggests that admitting mistakes is a powerful sign of strength. Here's why self-awareness, accountability, and the ability to say “I was wrong” reveal a truly strong personality.

articles.title: The domestic drift behind Trump’s Iran deal
articles.description: US foreign policy: Trump's Iran agreement signals a shift in Republican foreign policy shaped by domestic politics and the America First movement overturning traditional alliance hierarchies and prioritising electoral calculations in West Asia policy.

articles.title: Frequent power cuts and voltage fluctuations leave Noida residents fuming
articles.description: Frequent power cuts and voltage fluctuations leave Noida residents fuming

articles.title: Delhi HC upholds Telegram ban in India till June 22
articles.description: The Delhi High Court has upheld the government's decision to suspend Telegram services until June 22, citing its role in facilitating fraud during the NEET (UG) re-examination. The court found the government's actions justified, noting Telegram's architecture enables rapid dissemination of content and that targeted takedowns are insufficient to prevent leaks. The ban aims to ensure the integrity of the nationwide medical entrance exam.

articles.title: MSU study offers relief for Assam’s Bamboo Artisans through ergonomic workstation
articles.description: Prototype Designed By Researchers Aims To Reduce Injuries, Improve Posture

articles.title: Who Is John Cafaro? Trump Donor Faces Questions as Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool Turns Green
articles.description: John J. Cafaro, an Ohio businessman and notable donor to Donald Trump, is under scrutiny due to his connection with Greenwater Services, which received a $1.7 million contract for algae control at the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool.

articles.title: Tehran turns up the heat as doubts grow over the long-term survival of the Iran accord
articles.description: The Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps has issued a strong warning to the United States and Israel, saying any violation of Iran's rights under the newly announced agreement could trigger a much stronger response. The warning comes amid growing tensions over Lebanon, where continued military operations by Israel Defense Forces and clashes involving Hezbollah have raised questions about the durability of the reported U.S.-Iran framework. The dispute has added fresh uncertainty to future negotiations as diplomatic efforts face new obstacles and regional ceasefire arrangements come under pressure.

articles.title: US probes Germany's drug pricing, opens tariff doors
articles.description: The US has launched a trade probe into Germany's pharmaceutical pricing, alleging it unfairly burdens American commerce and forces the US to shoulder a disproportionate share of global drug development costs. This investigation, under Section 301, could lead to new tariffs on Germany. Officials cite concerns that German policies suppress prices for innovative medicines, impacting research funding and potentially affecting American patients.

articles.title: SSC Delhi Police Constable Result 2026 out; check merit list and next stage details
articles.description: The Staff Selection Commission has announced the Delhi Police Constable (Executive) 2026 results for the Computer-Based Test. Candidates who appeared for the exam held between December 2025 and January 2026 can now check their qualifying status on the official SSC website. Those who have cleared this stage are shortlisted for the Physical Endurance and Measurement Test, a crucial next step in the recruitment for 7,565 vacancies.

articles.title: Nitish Reddy Fit For 3rd ODI Against Afghanistan, Likely To Replace 27-Year-Old In Playing XI
articles.description: Nitish played in the series opener in Dharamsala on June 13 and picked up 2 wickets in his quota of four overs but had to miss the second match with a sore left thigh.

articles.title: Power availability: Heatwave, transmission fault hit UP, rural areas affected by load-shedding
articles.description: Uttar Pradesh faces electricity pressure due to high demand and a transmission failure, causing shortages and increased load-shedding amid extreme heat.

articles.title: Telangana CID arrests Worldline executive in ₹4,215 crore Falcon Invoice Discounting fraud case
articles.description: CID arrests Worldline executive Sheik Mohideen in ₹4,215 crore Falcon Invoice Discounting fraud case involving thousands of investors.

articles.title: Your awaited World cup event can be someone's dreaded night — link between sports and violence at home
articles.description: While multiple studies have documented ‘on-pitch’ violence and verbal exchanges among players, only few have observed the connection between watching sports behind a television and inciting violence at home.

articles.title: Modi says 70 lakh jobs created under PM-Viksit Bharat Rozgar Yojana so far; transfers initial incentives worth Rs 2,400 cr
articles.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi announced that the Pradhan Mantri Viksit Bharat Rozgar Yojana has generated over 70 lakh jobs, with Rs 2,400 crore in incentives recently disbursed to 15 lakh new employees and their employers. The scheme aims to empower first-time job seekers and foster a stronger workforce by bridging the gap between youth and industry. The government has allocated a significant outlay to create 3.

articles.title: 'Hang Me': Delhi Doctor Who Killed Househelp Had Argued With Wife Over Firing Her, Sent To Custody
articles.description: 'Hang Me': Delhi Doctor Who Killed Househelp Had Argued With Wife Over Firing Her, Sent To Custody

articles.title: CBI quizzes ex-KP officers in R G Kar case
articles.description: CBI questioned ex-Kolkata Police DCs Indira Mukherjee and Abhishek Gupta in the reopened RG Kar rape-murder probe; ex-CP Vineet Goyal summoned next week.

articles.title: Karnataka high court asks oil marketing companies to to reconsider ethanol firm’s allocation plea
articles.description: Karnataka high court asks oil marketing companies to to reconsider ethanol firm’s allocation plea

articles.title: Vision 2036 unveiled in Kerala revised budget
articles.description: Kerala's revised budget allocates ₹173.77 crore for Vision 2036, aiming to train athletes for the 2036 Olympics.
